rows.description: Computus Francisci Webber Rectoris a 2do Die
rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly segmented this as a distinct header line, while gemini-flash merged it. The text 'Rectoris a 2do' was taken from gemini-flash's more accurate reading of this part, correcting gpt-5-mini's 'Rectory a 2d'.
rows.section_header: Computus Francisci Webber Rectoris a 2do Die

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly segmented this as a distinct header line. The text 'Novembris' was corrected from gpt-5-mini's 'November' based on visual verification, aligning with gemini-flash's (merged) reading.
Full consensus between both extractors for description and row type. Visually confirmed as clear.

Amounts are in consensus. gemini-flash's description 'Merton pro Fine:' is visually verified as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Meriton pro Gies:'. gemini-flash's notes were generic but its transcription was superior here.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Fine payment received from Merton, amounting to £17 10s 4d.

rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. gemini-flash's description 'Gassington Saler pro an:' is visually verified as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Garrington Jader pro en:'. gpt-5-mini's note correctly identified ambiguity, but gemini-flash's transcription was closer to the visual evidence.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Gassington paid by Saler.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Gassington (Saler), amounting to £4 9s 11d.

rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. gemini-flash's description 'Molineux pro an:' is visually verified as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Molinaux pro en:'. gpt-5-mini's note again acknowledged uncertainty, lending more weight to gemini-flash's more confident (and accurate) reading.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Molineux, amounting to £4 9s 11d.

rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus as empty due to heavy strike-through. gemini-flash's description 'Madax pro an:' is visually verified as legible beneath the strike-through, providing a more specific transcription than gpt-5-mini's '[line crossed out]'. gpt-5-mini's note effectively highlighted the strike-through, but gemini-flash captured more detail.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Madax (amount not recorded).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Madax, amount not recorded.

rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. gemini-flash's description 'pro an:' is visually verified as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'pro en:'. gemini-flash's note regarding the flourish on the '5' in pence demonstrates careful visual examination.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from the South Newington tenement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from the South Newington tenement, amounting to £1 7s 5d.

rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Both extractors had minor discrepancies in the description. Visually verified the description as '- Recti pro an: & Dim:', where gemini-flash's '9 Dim' was a misinterpretation of '& Dim:' and gpt-5-mini's 'pro em: & Dien:' was further off. This required direct visual override for accuracy.
rows.english_description: Rectory rent for South Newington covering a year and a half.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rectory rent for South Newington covering a year and a half, amounting to £58 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. gemini-flash's description 'Lucas Eaton May, pro an:' is visually verified as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Lucas Eaton Mayr pro en:'. The comma after 'May' and 'pro an' are clearer in the image.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Lucas Eaton May.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Lucas Eaton May, amounting to £2 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. gemini-flash's description 'Franklyn pro an: (Copor 2-6)' is visually verified as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Franklyn pro en: (Capap 2-6)'. 'pro an' and 'Copor' are clearer.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Franklyn, amounting to £1 2s 6d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Additional annual payment from Franklyn, amounting to £0 15s 6d.

rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. gemini-flash's description 'Ladlane, Comyn pro an:' is visually verified as significantly more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Ladbne Cowyn pro en:'. gpt-5-mini's note correctly identified its own uncertainty, supporting the selection of gemini-flash's clearer transcription.

rows.description: Wild Arsh pro an: 9 q^a part:
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Both extractors had some discrepancies in the description. Adopted gemini-flash's 'Wild Arsh pro an:' as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Wid Arish pro an:'. The '9 qa part:' was refined to '9 q^a part:' based on direct visual verification of the superscript 'a', overriding both models' slight variations ('9 qa' vs '4th part').
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Wild Arsh (noted as ninth quarter part).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Wild Arsh (ninth quarter part), amounting to £5 0s 0d.
